case_title: DEXTERITY CAPITAL, LLC. VS. READISUITE, LLC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,160.00 FILED BY DEXTERITY CAPITAL, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT READISUITE, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEXTERITY CAPITAL, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT READISUITE, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
